apps.name: YouTube+
apps.versionDescription: [STABLE ytp-18] YouTube 21.19.2 + YTLite v5.2o (YouPiP, YouQuality, Return YouTube Dislikes, DontEatMyContent). Built 2026-05-20T01:55:03Z.
apps.localizedDescription: Enhanced YouTube iOS client: ad blocking, Picture-in-Picture, Return YouTube Dislikes, quality selection, and more. Built from the dayanch96/YTLite project via Jake's YTLite_v5.2o fork. Rebuilt periodically as decrypted IPAs refresh.

apps.name: YT-diag
apps.versionDescription: [DIAG ytp-diag-10] YouTube 21.19.2 + YTLite v5.2o (YouPiP, YouQuality, Return YouTube Dislikes, DontEatMyContent). File-logging capture build — see Documents/ytlite-diag.log via Finder File Sharing. Built 2026-05-19T23:47:20Z.
apps.localizedDescription: Diagnostic build of YouTube+. Identical features to the stable entry, plus a temporary file-based logging hook that writes cell class info to Documents/ytlite-diag.log (retrieve via Finder → iPhone → Files → YT-diag → drag the log out) so the maintainer can identify how YT 21.x labels shorts shelves. Different bundle id from the stable build — both can be installed side by side.
